ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To Feb-08-18 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Kevin P. Greenquist, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff THOMAS IVELI, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants NICHOLAS LANE AKA "NICHOLAS REMINGTON", RICHARD ALBA.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2256 Market Street, Apartment C, San Francisco, California 94114.

Damages $20,650.00
Holdover damages $2,909.40
Cost $340.00
Attorney's Fees $0
For a Total Judgment of $23,899.40

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Thomas Iveli is present.
Attorney Kevin P. Greenquist for the plaintiff.
Defendant Nicholas Lane is NOT present.

***Plaintiff and Counsel released at 2:00pm by JPT.***

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of October 30, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
